titleStmt.title: SII 20.164: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 164. (B.K. No. 81 of 1937-38.) TENIHAḶḶI, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken stone built into the wall of the house of the Jahagirdar.

summary.p: This fragmentary record is dated in the king's regnal year 2, Durmukhi, Mārgas11ira, Amāvasyā, Thursday, Dhanu-saṁkramaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1176 November 2. Thursday, f.d.t. ·19. Saṁkramaṇa did not ccur on that day.
The inscription registers a gift of income derived from the cess on paddy, betel leaves and nuts in the Thirty-six villages division with Chīkka-Rūvige as the chief place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
damaged
sōmanāthadēvā
bhōga sōte suṇṇa
ddhāra samasta
gaḷa Āhāradāna
śrīmatu kaḷacuryyabhu
jabaḷacakravartti mallugidē
vavarṣada 2 neya durmmukhi saṁva
tsarada mārggasiradamāvāsye .
brihaspativāra dhanusaṁkra
māṇa nimittavāgi
meya saṁpaṁnarumappa
nayyaṁgaḷge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ
māḍi cikkarūvigeya sthaḷa .
mukhyavāgi mūvattāṟu bā
ḍada grāmānugrāmadalu bi
ṭṭa Āya māṟida bhattadalli dē
vargge koṭṭalli māna 1 koṁḍalli 1
hoṁge Aḍake 10 hoṟege
māṟidalli hoṁge Ele 50 saṁteya
panāya haḍake Ardha sollage
hagaraṇada bhatta rāsiya
saṭṭuga 1 yiṁtinitumaṁ
seṭṭiguttaruṁ samastanā
ḷu muṁmuridaṁḍaṁ
pratipāḷisuvaru . yī sā
sanamarmyādeyaṁ pratipā
ḷisidavaru kurukṣētradoḷu
sahaśrakavileyaṁ parōkṣa
vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge ko
ṭṭa puṁṇyada phalamaneydu
varu Īdanaḷidavargge vāra
ṇāsiyalu hattusahaśrakapile
yumaṁ hattu sahaśra brāhmaṇa
rumanaḷida pāpaṁ
Digital edition of SII 20.164 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
